overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark rural environment at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The camera moves along a dirt path through dense vegetation before approaching and passing an old stone cottage, suggesting a survival horror or exploration game setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with dense vegetation on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path, sweeping the flashlight across the trail to navigate through the dense vegetation

entered.detail: thick bushes and small trees lining the left side of the path
thick bushes and small trees lining the right side of the path
narrow dirt path with scattered stones winding through the forest
tall dark silhouettes of trees visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a densely vegetated forest trail at night. The flashlight illuminates the narrow dirt path ahead while thick bushes and trees flank both sides. The environment is enclosed and dark, with only the beam of light revealing the immediate surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural clearing with abandoned stone cottage

events.description: exiting dense forest into open clearing where stone cottage becomes visible on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the stone cottage, flashlight illuminating the building facade and surrounding clearing

entered.detail: old stone building with steep roof and small windows, partially obscured by bushes
weathered wooden fence posts near the cottage entrance
distant open field with scattered trees visible beyond the cottage

changed.to: wider clearing path approaching the building

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider rural clearing as the stone cottage comes into view on the left. The camera approaches the old building, revealing its weathered stone walls and wooden fence. The dense forest gives way to more open terrain with scattered vegetation, and the path widens as it leads toward the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic forest trail into an open rural clearing featuring an old stone cottage. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the darkness of a narrow dirt path, where thick bushes and towering trees create an enclosed, oppressive atmosphere. As the camera advances, the dense vegetation gradually thins, allowing the beam of light to reveal a widening path and more open terrain. The scene then expands as the forest gives way to a clearing, bringing a weathered stone cottage and its wooden fence into view on the left. The movement concludes as the camera approaches the aged structure, shifting from the tight confines of the woods to the exposed surroundings of the rural homestead.
